summary: Frontend testing of new /imos/app-directory and /imos/onboarding-preview pages completed. All requested features verified working. Both pages load correctly, mobile responsiveness confirmed, navigation updated with 'Directory' link, hub page includes 'Experience iMOs' section.

issues: React Native Web console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' props and 'pointerEvents' props - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Routes ./imos/_components.tsx and ./onboarding/slideLibraries.ts show 'missing default export' console warnings - this is expected as they are utility files, not route components. Expo Router complains but functionality works correctly.
All URLs in app-directory correctly use PROD_BASE constant (https://app.imosapp.com) for sharing
Responsive breakpoint (width > 768) correctly switches between mobile and desktop layouts
Category expand/collapse uses LayoutAnimation for smooth transitions
Slide navigation supports keyboard (ArrowLeft/Right, Escape) for desktop users
Individual role maps to SALESPERSON_SLIDES correctly (same 15 steps)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new public pages added under /imos/: app-directory (55 pages across 11 categories with search, copy, share) and onboarding-preview (5 role cards with slide walkthrough). Header nav updated to show 'Directory' instead of 'Hub'. Hub page (/imos/hub) now has 'Experience iMOs' section with links to both new pages. All URLs display app.imosapp.com format for sharing.

mocked_apis.note: Share API calls to /admin/app-directory/share expected to fail without auth as mentioned in review request

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features verified working correctly
